summary: Implemented the 6 hand-coded transcendence commands plus shared helpers and a local rating-snapshot table.
reason: Generator emits novel-feature stubs; these are the real implementations of best/compare/nearby-best/drift/digest/fit, the shared Tripadvisor fetch/parse/rank helpers, and the drift snapshot store schema.
validated_outcome: Live dogfood 63/63; sample-output probe 6/6 against the live Content API; go test ./internal/cli ./internal/store pass.
